name: Mos' Nilly Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic with salt to form a gritty paste.
2. Add the mashed avocado and mash again.
3. Pour lemon juice over the avocado mixture until it keeps its color, then stir well.
4. Add olive oil, followed by Louisiana hot sauce; stir.
5. Stir in Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce and wine vinegar.
6. Stir in mustard.
7. Crumble feta cheese into the dressing.
8. Add chopped tomatoes and parsley, stirring to combine.
9. Serve over lettuce. Enjoy as a dip.
